name: KUAE Cloud Coding Plan

dataResidency.euRegionDetails: The provider identified is Moore Threads (摩尔线程), a Beijing-based company. The KUAE materials and company site describe KUAE as part of its China-based intelligent computing infrastructure, but no primary-source documentation found on the consulted pages offers an EU region or an EU-only processing option.

dataUsage.retentionPolicy: The public privacy policy states that if Moore Threads stops operating its products/services, it will delete or anonymize retained personal information unless a legally required retention period applies. No KUAE/API-specific retention schedule was found.
dataUsage.details: The privacy policy covers website and service personal information collection such as trial applications, downloads, browsing, and support requests, but no primary-source statement was found specifically confirming whether KUAE API/customer content is used for model training.

notes: Primary sources confirm KUAE is a Moore Threads offering operated by a Beijing, China company, and public materials do not expose a DPA, sub-processor list, SCCs, or EU-only hosting/inference commitments. The available privacy policy is general and website/service oriented rather than a detailed GDPR-ready processor package for an API inference service.
